top3.sql:
SELECT ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.name
JOIN (
    SELECT r.raceId, l.driverId
    FROM lapTimes l
    JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
    JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
    WHERE c.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit'
    ORDER BY l.milliseconds ASC
    LIMIT 1
) fastest_lap ON ps.raceId = fastest_lap.raceId AND ps.driverId = fastest_lap.driverId
WHERE c.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit';

SELECT ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.name
JOIN (
    SELECT r.raceId, l.driverId
    FROM lapTimes l
    JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
    JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
    WHERE c.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit'
    ORDER BY l.milliseconds ASC
    LIMIT 1
) fastest_lap ON ps.raceId = fastest_lap.raceId AND ps.driverId = fastest_lap.driverId
WHERE c.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit';

SELECT ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.name
JOIN (
    SELECT r.raceId, l.driverId
    FROM lapTimes l
    JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
    JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
    WHERE c.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit'
    ORDER BY l.milliseconds ASC
    LIMIT 1
) fastest_lap ON ps.raceId = fastest_lap.raceId AND ps.driverId = fastest_lap.driverId
WHERE c.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit';

SELECT ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit'
  AND ps.driverId = (
    SELECT l.driverId
    FROM lapTimes l
    JOIN races r2 ON l.raceId = r2.raceId
    JOIN circuits c2 ON r2.circuitId = c2.circuitId
    WHERE c2.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit'
    ORDER BY l.milliseconds ASC
    LIMIT 1
  );

final.sql:
SELECT ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.name
JOIN (
    SELECT r.raceId, l.driverId
    FROM lapTimes l
    JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
    JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
    WHERE c.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit'
    ORDER BY l.milliseconds ASC
    LIMIT 1
) fastest_lap ON ps.raceId = fastest_lap.raceId AND ps.driverId = fastest_lap.driverId
WHERE c.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit';
